title: Inject Bootstrapping Cognition Block into Cursorrules
why: User explicitly requested that a strict BOOTSTRAP GEP ERP ENGINEERING COGNITION block be read at the start of every session to ensure AI agents do not act as generic chatbots.
root_cause: User explicitly requested that a strict BOOTSTRAP GEP ERP ENGINEERING COGNITION block be read at the start of every session to ensure AI agents do not act as generic chatbots.
solution: Prepended the 7-step BOOTSTRAP block to the very top of .cursorrules so it triggers immediately upon workspace load.
